title: report.json — scorecard + narrative for one unit
description: Lean: holds only the score table and narrative fields unique to the report. The rendered report.md is assembled by walking report.json + extraction.json + audit.json + findings.json, so this file does not duplicate contract or gap data.

source_files.description: Paths rendered in the report header.

overall_score.description: Weighted sum of category scores. Deterministically computed by the scoring script — LLM must not hand-author this number.

verdict.description: Derived from overall_score: WEAK < 4, OK < 7, STRONG >= 7. Also computed by script.

weight.description: Fractional weight summing to 1.0 across all 6 categories (0.25, 0.15, 0.20, 0.15, 0.15, 0.10).

rationale_md.description: One-sentence rationale for the category score. LLM-authored.

exec_summary_md.description: Optional 2-3 sentence executive summary shown near the top of the rendered report.

test_structure_tree_md.description: Optional unified Test Structure Tree rendered as a fenced ASCII tree. Computed by score.py by merging test_tree[] from all 03*-gaps-*.json sub-files (dedupe fields by name, dedupe scenarios by description, prefer covered=true).

contract_map_md.description: Optional unified Contract Map rendered as a markdown table. Computed by score.py by merging contract_map[] from all 03*-gaps-*.json sub-files (dedupe by field_kind+field).

anti_patterns_md.description: Optional Anti-Patterns table rendered from 02-audit.json.anti_patterns[]. Computed by score.py.

gap_analysis_md.description: Optional Gap Analysis by Priority section — bulleted list of all gaps grouped by priority. Read from findings.json by score.py.

hygiene_md.description: Optional Hygiene narrative — rendered per-anti-pattern from 02-audit.json.anti_patterns[] with full rationale_md and recommendation. Computed by score.py.
